changes: Rewrote verbose 430-line SKILL.md to concise 60-line action-oriented version
Added CRITICAL instruction to act immediately without asking for confirmation
Specified exact directory names (images, documents, code, media, archives, misc) with extension mappings
Provided copy-paste bash patterns for bulk file moves
Added explicit handling for filenames with spaces
Kept duplicate detection instructions with md5 checksum approach and output format
root_cause: Original skill instructed the model to propose a plan and ask for user confirmation before executing, causing the model to stop after proposing without organizing any files
